chants.title: Going for Refuge (First Time)
chants.text_pali:
Buddham saranam gacchami.
Dhammam saranam gacchami.
Sangham saranam gacchami.
chants.text_translation:
To the Buddha I go for refuge.
To the Dhamma I go for refuge.
To the Sangha I go for refuge.

chants.title: Going for Refuge (Second Time)
chants.text_pali:
Dutiyampi Buddham saranam gacchami.
Dutiyampi Dhammam saranam gacchami.
Dutiyampi Sangham saranam gacchami.
chants.text_translation:
For the second time, to the Buddha I go for refuge.
For the second time, to the Dhamma I go for refuge.
For the second time, to the Sangha I go for refuge.

chants.title: Going for Refuge (Third Time)
chants.text_pali:
Tatiyampi Buddham saranam gacchami.
Tatiyampi Dhammam saranam gacchami.
Tatiyampi Sangham saranam gacchami.
chants.text_translation:
For the third time, to the Buddha I go for refuge.
For the third time, to the Dhamma I go for refuge.
For the third time, to the Sangha I go for refuge.

chants.title: Five Precepts
chants.text_pali:
Panatipata veramani sikkhapadam samadiyami.
Adinnadana veramani sikkhapadam samadiyami.
Kamesu micchacara veramani sikkhapadam samadiyami.
Musavada veramani sikkhapadam samadiyami.
Suramerayamajjapamadatthana veramani sikkhapadam samadiyami.
chants.text_translation:
I undertake the training rule to abstain from taking life.
I undertake the training rule to abstain from taking what is not given.
I undertake the training rule to abstain from sexual misconduct.
I undertake the training rule to abstain from false speech.
I undertake the training rule to abstain from intoxicants that cause heedlessness.

chants.title: Eight Precepts
chants.text_pali:
Panatipata veramani sikkhapadam samadiyami.
Adinnadana veramani sikkhapadam samadiyami.
Abrahmacariya veramani sikkhapadam samadiyami.
Musavada veramani sikkhapadam samadiyami.
Suramerayamajjapamadatthana veramani sikkhapadam samadiyami.
Vikala bhojana veramani sikkhapadam samadiyami.
Nacca gita vadita visuka dassana veramani sikkhapadam samadiyami.
Uccasayana mahasayana veramani sikkhapadam samadiyami.
chants.text_translation: I undertake to abstain from taking life, from stealing, from sexual activity, from false speech, from intoxicants, from eating at the wrong time, from entertainment and adornments, and from high and luxurious beds.

chants.title: Homage to the Buddha
chants.text_pali:
Itipi so Bhagava araham sammasambuddho
Vijjacaranasampanno sugato lokavidu
Anuttaro purisadammasarathi sattha devamanussanam
Buddho Bhagava.
chants.text_translation: Such indeed is the Blessed One, worthy, fully enlightened, endowed with knowledge and conduct, well-gone, knower of worlds, incomparable trainer of persons, teacher of gods and humans, the Buddha, the Blessed One.

chants.title: Homage to the Dhamma
chants.text_pali: Svakkhato Bhagavata dhammo sanditthiko akaliko ehipassiko opanayiko paccattam veditabbo vinnuhi.
chants.text_translation: Well expounded is the Dhamma by the Blessed One, directly visible, immediate, inviting investigation, leading onward, to be experienced individually by the wise.

chants.title: Homage to the Sangha
chants.text_pali:
Supatipanno Bhagavato savakasangho
Uju patipanno Bhagavato savakasangho
Nyaya patipanno Bhagavato savakasangho
Samici patipanno Bhagavato savakasangho
Yadidam cattari purisayugani attha purisapuggala esa Bhagavato savakasangho ahuneyyo pahuneyyo dakkhineyyo anjalikaraniyo anuttaram punyakkhettam lokassa.
chants.text_translation: Of good conduct is the Sangha of the Blessed One's disciples, of upright conduct, of wise conduct, of dutiful conduct — the four pairs of persons, the eight kinds of individuals — this Sangha is worthy of gifts, hospitality, offerings, salutation, and is the supreme field of merit for the world.

chants.title: Karaniya Metta Sutta (Opening)
chants.text_pali:
Karaniyamattha kusalena yanta santam padam abhisamecca
Sakko uju ca suju ca suvaco c'assa mudu anatimani.
chants.text_translation: He who is skilled in goodness and wishes to attain that state of peace should act thus: able, upright, perfectly upright, obedient, gentle, and humble.

chants.title: Metta Sutta (Core Verses)
chants.text_pali:
Mata yatha niyam puttam ayusa ekaputtam anurakkhe
Evampi sabba bhutesu manasam bhavaye aparimanam
Mettan ca sabba lokasmim manasam bhavaye aparimanam
Uddham adho ca tiriyam sabbadhi sabbattataya santimettam.
chants.text_translation: Just as a mother would protect her only child at the risk of her own life, even so let one cultivate a boundless heart toward all beings. Let loving-kindness pervade the whole world — above, below, and across — without obstruction.

chants.title: Mangala Sutta (Blessings)
chants.text_pali:
Bahum sahassam abhinimmita vo
Rattim gahantam viharam upagato
Devata namassam anupubbena
Natthi manussesu ito visesam.
chants.text_translation: Many deities and humans, having considered what is auspicious, have come to pay homage. Among humans there is nothing higher than these blessings.

chants.title: Ratana Sutta (Jewels)
chants.text_pali:
Yanidha bhutani samagatani
Bhummani va yani va antalikkhe
Sabbeva bhuta sumanas bhavantu
Athopi sabbabhutabhavam sada sotthi te hotu niccam.
chants.text_translation: Whatever beings are assembled here, on earth or in the sky, may all beings be happy. May the Buddha jewel bring you safety always.

chants.title: Bojjhanga Paritta
chants.text_pali:
Buddho me natho dhammo me natho sangho me natho
Satipatthana me natho samadhi me natho viriya me natho panna me natho.
chants.text_translation: The Buddha is my protector, the Dhamma is my protector, the Sangha is my protector. Mindfulness, concentration, energy, and wisdom are my protectors.

chants.title: Atitaya Paritta
chants.text_pali:
Akantam ca kananam ca phusanam ca mahabbhayam
Antarayam ca dukkham ca dukkham me na upatissati.
chants.text_translation: May the disagreeable, the forest, contact with danger, obstacles and suffering not befall me.

chants.title: Dhammapada 183 (Training)
chants.text_pali:
Sabbapapassa akaranam kusalassa upasampada
Sacittapariyodapanam etam buddhana sasanam.
chants.text_translation: To abstain from all evil, to cultivate good, and to purify one's mind — this is the teaching of the Buddhas.

chants.title: Three Characteristics
chants.text_pali:
Anicca vata sankhara uppada vaya dhammino
Uppajjitva nirujjhanti tesam vupasamo sukho.
chants.text_translation: Impermanent indeed are formations; they arise and cease. Having arisen, they cease; their calming is bliss.

chants.title: Morning Offering Chant
chants.text_pali: Suprabhatam bhante, suprabhatam bhante, suprabhatam bhante.
chants.text_translation: A very good morning, venerable sir (three times).

chants.title: Evening Paritta Closing
chants.text_pali:
Sabbe satta sukhi hontu, sabbe satta avera hontu
Sabbe satta abyapajjha hontu, sabbe satta anigha hontu
Sabbe satta sukhi attanam pariharantu.
chants.text_translation: May all beings be happy, free from enmity, free from mental suffering, free from bodily suffering, and may they look after themselves with ease.

chants.title: Funeral Anicca Verses
chants.text_pali:
Anicca vata sankhara, uppada vaya dhammino
Uppajjitva nirujjhanti, tesam vupasamo sukho.
chants.text_translation: Impermanent are all formations; their nature is to arise and pass away. Having arisen, they cease; peace in their stilling is happiness.

chants.title: Sharing of Merit
chants.text_pali:
Idam no natinam hotu sukhita hontu natayo
Idam vo natinam hotu sukhita hontu natayo.
chants.text_translation: May this merit reach our relatives; may our relatives be happy. May this merit reach your relatives; may your relatives be happy.

chants.title: Meal Blessing
chants.text_pali: Bhojanam paccayam patiganhama.
chants.text_translation: We accept this food as support.

chants.title: Suffusion with Metta
chants.text_pali: Sabbe satta bhavantu sukhitatta.
chants.text_translation: May all beings be happy in themselves.

chants.title: Patimokkha Closing
chants.text_pali: Svakkhato Bhagavata dhammo, sanditthiko akaliko ehipassiko opanayiko paccattam veditabbo vinnuhi.
chants.text_translation: Well proclaimed is the Dhamma by the Blessed One — visible here and now, timeless, inviting inspection, onward-leading, to be known by the wise for themselves.

chants.title: Jaya Mangala Gatha
chants.text_pali:
Bahum sahassam abhinimmita vo
Rattim gahantam viharam upagato.
chants.text_translation: Having created a thousand-fold manifestation, the devas came to the monastery at night.

chants.title: Full Tisarana with Pali and Response
chants.text_pali:
Namo tassa Bhagavato Arahato Sammasambuddhassa
Namo tassa Bhagavato Arahato Sammasambuddhassa
Namo tassa Bhagavato Arahato Sammasambuddhassa.
chants.text_translation: Homage to the Blessed One, the Worthy One, the Fully Enlightened Buddha (three times).

chants.title: Dependent Origination (Brief)
chants.text_pali: Avijjapaccaya sankhara, sankharapaccaya vinnanam, vinnanapaccaya namarupam, namarupapaccaya salayatanam, salayatanapaccaya phasso, phassapaccaya vedana, vedanapaccaya tanha, tanhapaccaya upadanam, upadanapaccaya bhavo, bhavapaccaya jati, jatipaccaya jaramaranam.
chants.text_translation: From ignorance come formations; from formations, consciousness; from consciousness, name-and-form; from name-and-form, the six sense bases; from the six sense bases, contact; from contact, feeling; from feeling, craving; from craving, clinging; from clinging, becoming; from becoming, birth; from birth, aging and death.

chants.title: Girimananda Sutta (Bojjhanga)
chants.text_pali: Sati bojjhango, dhammavicaya bojjhango, viriya bojjhango, piti bojjhango, passaddhi bojjhango, samadhi bojjhango, upekkha bojjhango.
chants.text_translation: The enlightenment factors are mindfulness, investigation of phenomena, energy, rapture, tranquility, concentration, and equanimity.

chants.title: Dhajagga Paritta
chants.text_pali: Etam buddhana sasanam, etam buddhana sasanam, etam buddhana sasanam.
chants.text_translation: This is the teaching of the Buddhas (repeated).

chants.title: Morning Dedication
chants.text_pali: Aham avero homi, abyapajjho homi, anigho homi, sukhi attanam pariharami.
chants.text_translation: May I be free from enmity, free from affliction, free from anxiety, and may I maintain myself with ease.

chants.title: Evening Dedication
chants.text_pali: Handa mayam bhante viharam, handa mayam bhante viharam.
chants.text_translation: Venerable sir, let us now dwell in meditation (twice).

chants.title: Funeral Metta
chants.text_pali:
Sabbe satta sada hontu avera sukhi jivino
Katam punna phalam mayham sabbe bhagi bhavantu te.
chants.text_translation: May all beings always live happily, free from enmity. May all share in the merit of this good deed.

chants.title: Buddha Vandana
chants.text_pali: Buddham namassami, Dhammam namassami, Sangham namassami.
chants.text_translation: I pay homage to the Buddha, the Dhamma, and the Sangha.
